det_check_template:
proof fn det_page_perm_to_page_map(page_ptr: PagePtr, ?: Tracked<PagePerm4k>, r1: (
    PageMapPtr,
    Tracked<PointsTo<PageMap>>,
), r2: (
    PageMapPtr,
    Tracked<PointsTo<PageMap>>,
))
    requires (page_perm.is_init()), (page_perm.addr() == page_ptr),
    ensures
        ({
            &&& (r1.0 == page_ptr)
            &&& (r1.1@.addr() == r1.0)
            &&& (r1.1@.is_init())
            &&& (r1.1@.value().wf())
            &&& (forall|i: usize|
            #![trigger r1.1@.value()[i].is_empty()]
            0 <= i < 512 ==> r1.1@.value()[i].is_empty())
            &&& (r2.0 == page_ptr)
            &&& (r2.1@.addr() == r2.0)
            &&& (r2.1@.is_init())
            &&& (r2.1@.value().wf())
            &&& (forall|i: usize|
            #![trigger r2.1@.value()[i].is_empty()]
            0 <= i < 512 ==> r2.1@.value()[i].is_empty())
        }) ==> det_page_perm_to_page_map_equal(r1, r2),
{
{ASSUMES}}
